zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor FitzGerald於大約1461年出生在愛爾蘭時，她的父親Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare41歲，母親Joan Cam Fitzgerald33歲。她於1479年與Conn Mor O'Neil, King of Tir Eogain在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1549年在她的家鄉享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor FitzGerald于大约1461年出生在爱尔兰时，她的父亲Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare41岁，母亲Joan Cam Fitzgerald33岁。她于1479年与Conn Mor O'Neil, King of Tir Eogain在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1549年在她的家乡享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor FitzGerald was born about 1461, in Ireland, her father, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare, was 41 and her mother, Joan Cam Fitzgerald, was 33. She married Conn Mor O'Neil, King of Tir Eogain in 1479, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1549, in her hometown, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor FitzGerald est née environ 1461, à Irlande, son père, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joan Cam Fitzgerald, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Conn Mor O'Neil, King of Tir Eogain en 1479, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1549, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eleanor FitzGerald um 1461 in Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare 41 und ihre Mutter Joan Cam Fitzgerald 33. Sie hat 1479 in Irland Conn Mor O'Neil, King of Tir Eogain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1549 im Alter von 89 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor FitzGerald è nata il circa 1461 nel Irlanda, sua padre, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Joan Cam Fitzgerald, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Conn Mor O'Neil, King of Tir Eogain nel 1479, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1549, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor FitzGeraldが約1461年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildareは41歳，母Joan Cam Fitzgeraldは33歳であった。1479年にアイルランドでConn Mor O'Neil, King of Tir Eogainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1549年に故郷で89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor FitzGerald(이)가 대략 1461년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Cam Fitzgerald(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1479년 아일랜드에서 Conn Mor O'Neil, King of Tir Eogain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1549년 그녀의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor FitzGerald nasceu aproximadamente 1461, em Irlanda, seu pai, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joan Cam Fitzgerald, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Conn Mor O'Neil, King of Tir Eogain em 1479, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1549, em sua cidade natal, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor FitzGerald родилась около 1461 г. в местности Ирландия, её отцу по имени Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Cam Fitzgerald, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Conn Mor O'Neil, King of Tir Eogain в 1479 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1549 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Eleanor FitzGerald nació aproximadamente 1461, en Irlanda, su papá, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joan Cam Fitzgerald, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Conn Mor O'Neil, King of Tir Eogain en 1479, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1549, en su pueblo, a la edad de 89 años.
